description_long: This is a compact hatchback car with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of late 20th-century European models. The body is primarily painted in a muted silver-gray color, with black trim around the windows, bumpers, and wheel arches. The car features four side doors and a rear hatch, with simple, angular lines and minimal ornamentation. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels are solid black, giving the vehicle a slightly stylized, cartoonish appearance. The front end has a wide black grille and rectangular headlights, while the rear displays red and amber tail lights and a white license plate area. Subtle details such as door handles, side mirrors, and vent slits on the rear fender add to the realism of the vehicle.
description: A silver-gray, boxy hatchback car with black trim, four doors, and a rear hatch, featuring dark windows and stylized wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, black wheels, and vent slits on the rear fender.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rear hatch, tail lights, and a white license plate area.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, two doors, and similar features as the left side.
description_view_3: Front view with a wide black grille, rectangular headlights, and a sloped hood.
